content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Decoding Genome". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/222/problem/E
constraints: The genome string only contains the characters 'A', 'C', 'G', and 'T'.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the length of the genome. The second line contains a string of length n, representing the genome.
content.outputFormat: The decoded genome as a string.

solution.approach: Use a stack to keep track of the opening and closing brackets, and a set to store the indices of the opening brackets.
